title: Nakhal Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Nakhal with a Z-Score of +7.40. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heat wave in Nakhal is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 24.9 GG. 
 The low humidity of 9% and wind speed of 23.4 km/h are exacerbating the situation. 
 The city is experiencing a critical level of heat stress, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
